extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-txt.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract plain text from a PDF document and save it as a UTF-8 encoded .txt file.

extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream
extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a MemoryStream, extract its text using PdfExtractor, and write the extracted text to another MemoryStream for in‑memory processing.

check-pdf-contains-text.title: Check if PDF Contains Text via MemoryStream
check-pdf-contains-text.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text into a MemoryStream and determine whether the PDF file contains any textual content.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs to Matching Text Files
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF documents, extract their text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and write each output to a .txt file that shares the original filename.

check-pdf-for-text-and-images.title: Check PDF for Text and Images using PdfExtractor
check-pdf-for-text-and-images.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to determine whether a PDF contains both textual content and at least one image.

extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-text-and-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract both the textual content and embedded images from a PDF file and save them to separate files.

extract-text-from-protected-pdf.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
extract-text-from-protected-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to provide the owner password to a PdfExtractor, bind a protected PDF, and extract its text to a file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.title: Extract PDF Text to UTF-8 File
extract-pdf-text-to-utf8-file.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, extract its text using UTF-8 encoding with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and write the result to a UTF-8 text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-bytes.title: Extract Text from PDF Bytes Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf-bytes.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF stored in a byte array to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text entirely in memory, and convert the result to a .NET string.

extract-pdf-text-and-split-into-pages.title: Extract PDF Text and Split into Pages
extract-pdf-text-and-split-into-pages.description: Demonstrates how to extract the full text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, then split the result into individual page files using the form‑feed delimiter returned by GetText.

pdfextractor-text-extraction-test.title: Unit Test for PdfExtractor Text Extraction
pdfextractor-text-extraction-test.description: Shows how to generate a temporary PDF with known text, extract that text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and verify the output with a unit test.

extract-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Text from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text, and output the result to the console.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder for Manipulation
extract-pdf-text-to-stringbuilder.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF, load it into a StringBuilder for processing, and then save the manipulated text to a file.

batch-extract-text-from-pdfs__v2.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs using PdfExtractor
batch-extract-text-from-pdfs__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from every PDF in a folder and save each as a .txt file.

extract-text-save-verify-pdf.title: Extract Text from PDF, Save to File and Verify
extract-text-save-verify-pdf.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF, save it to a temporary file, read it back, and verify that the saved content matches the original extraction.

extract-pdf-text-aes-encryption.title: Extract PDF Text and Encrypt with AES
extract-pdf-text-aes-encryption.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then encrypt the resulting .txt file with AES‑256 before saving.

detect-text-only-pdf-by-extracting-image.title: Detect Text‑Only PDF by Extracting Images
detect-text-only-pdf-by-extracting-image.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from a PDF and determine if the document contains only text by confirming that no images are produced.

extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array
extract-text-from-pdf-byte-array.description: Demonstrates reading a PDF file into a byte array, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull the text, and returning the extracted content as JSON.

extract-pdf-text-to-postgresql.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
extract-pdf-text-to-postgresql.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and insert the extracted content into a PostgreSQL table for searchable indexing.

cancel-pdf-text-extraction.title: Cancel PDF Text Extraction with CancellationToken
cancel-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while allowing the operation to be aborted via a CancellationToken and InterruptMonitor.

extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream__v2.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream for Further Processing
extract-pdf-text-to-memorystream__v2.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF, write it into a MemoryStream, and reset the stream for consumption by another library.

extract-pdf-text-queue-function.title: Extract PDF Text via Azure Queue‑Triggered Function
extract-pdf-text-queue-function.description: Demonstrates an Azure Function that is triggered by a storage queue, downloads a PDF blob, extracts its text using Aspose.Pdf, and uploads the resulting .txt file to another container.

extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.title: Extract PDF Text and Compress to GZip
extract-pdf-text-to-gzip.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF and write it directly into a GZipStream, producing a compressed .txt.gz file.

extract-text-from-pdfs-azure-blob.title: Extract Text from PDFs in Azure Blob Storage
extract-text-from-pdfs-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates a batch job that enumerates PDF files in an Azure Blob container, extracts their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and uploads the resulting .txt files back to the same container.

pdf-diagnostic-tool.title: Report PDF Page, Image, and Attachment Counts
pdf-diagnostic-tool.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to obtain the total number of pages, images, and file attachments in a PDF document.

create-pdf-summary-from-first-three-page.title: Create PDF Summary from First Three Pages
create-pdf-summary-from-first-three-page.description: Extracts text from the first three pages of a PDF using PdfExtractor and generates a new PDF that contains the extracted text as a summary document.

retry-pdf-text-extraction.title: Retry PDF Text Extraction with PdfExtractor
retry-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor with a retry loop that handles IOException and retries up to three times.

extract-text-from-pdf__v2.title: Extract Text from PDF using PdfExtractor
extract-text-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract its text, and output the Unicode content to the console.

extract-pdf-text-to-azure-table.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in Azure Table
extract-pdf-text-to-azure-table.description: The sample extracts all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and saves the extracted content into Azure Table storage, using the PDF file name as the partition key.

async-pdf-text-image-extraction.title: Asynchronous PDF Text and Image Extraction with Aspose.Pdf
async-pdf-text-image-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract PDF text and images asynchronously using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, keeping UI threads responsive with async/await and cancellation support.

extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.title: Extract PDF Text and Write to StringWriter
extract-pdf-text-to-stringwriter.description: Demonstrates how to extract Unicode text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and capture it in a StringWriter for logging or further processing.

configurable-pdf-extraction.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
configurable-pdf-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text, images, and attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, with the extraction options controlled by an external JSON configuration file.

extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-pages-png.description: Shows how to use PdfExtractor to pull only the images from pages 5 through 10 of a PDF and save each image as a PNG file.

extract-images-defined-in-resources.title: Extract Images Defined in PDF Resources
extract-images-defined-in-resources.description: Shows how to set the ImageExtractionMode to DefinedInResources and use PdfExtractor to retrieve images that are stored as PDF resources rather than inline.

extract-images-from-first-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
extract-images-from-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract all images from the first page of a PDF and store each image directly in a byte array for further processing.

extract-images-to-bmp.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as BMP
extract-images-to-bmp.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all images from a PDF and save each one as a BMP file, preserving the original resolution and color depth.

export-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.title: Export PDF Images to JPEG with Quality 85
export-pdf-images-to-jpeg-quality-85.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF file and save them as JPEG files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter with a quality setting of 85.

extract-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
extract-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF using the default extraction mode and save them to a temporary directory.

extract-images-to-base64.title: Extract Images from PDF and Convert to Base64
extract-images-to-base64.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, convert each image stream to a Base64 string, and serialize the results to JSON.

extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
extract-images-from-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor by setting StartPage and EndPage to the same value.

extract-images-to-tiff.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as TIFF
extract-images-to-tiff.description: Shows how to extract images from a PDF using PdfExtractor and convert each image to a lossless TIFF file with TiffDevice for archival storage.

extract-pdf-images-validate-signature.title: Extract PDF Images and Verify File Signatures
extract-pdf-images-validate-signature.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves each as a PNG file, and validates the saved file's magic number to ensure the image is not corrupted.

parallel-image-extraction-from-pdfs.title: Parallel Image Extraction from Multiple PDFs
parallel-image-extraction-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

extract-images-to-unc-share.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Share with Fallback
extract-images-to-unc-share.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them to a network UNC path, with a ping check and fallback to a local folder if the share is unavailable.

extract-images-pdf-thumbnails.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Thumbnails
extract-images-pdf-thumbnails.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and generating PNG thumbnails with a maximum dimension of 200 pixels.

extract-images-from-pdf-using-pdfextract.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Automatic Disposal
extract-images-from-pdf-using-pdfextract.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extracting all images, and saving them to a folder while using a using block to automatically dispose the extractor.

extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF
extract-images-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, extract all embedded images, and save them to a specified directory.

extract-text-only-from-pdf.title: Extract Text Only from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-text-only-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only the textual content from a PDF while ignoring all images by not invoking the image extraction method.

extract-images-pdf-html-base64.title: Extract Images from PDF and Embed as Base64 in HTML
extract-images-pdf-html-base64.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF, convert them to Base64 strings, and embed them directly into an HTML report via data URIs.

error-handling-pdfextractor-bindpdf.title: Error Handling for PdfExtractor BindPdf
error-handling-pdfextractor-bindpdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfExtractor and catch specific Aspose.Pdf exceptions that occur when the file is corrupted or has an invalid format.

extract-text-images-from-pdf-stream.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Stream without Files
extract-text-images-from-pdf-stream.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF received as a stream to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and extract all textual content and embedded images directly into memory.

extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
extract-pdf-images-to-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and upload each image as a PNG to an Azure Blob container.

extract-images-and-compress-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Compress as PNG
extract-images-and-compress-png.description: Demonstrates extracting rendered images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and re‑encoding them as losslessly compressed PNG files.

extract-images-original-format.title: Extract Images from PDF in Original Format
extract-images-original-format.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from a PDF while preserving their original format by setting ExtractImageMode to ActuallyUsed.

extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Manifest
extract-images-pdf-csv-manifest.description: The example extracts all images from each page of a PDF, saves them as PNG files, and creates a CSV file that lists each image's file name, page number, and dimensions.

extract-images-from-pdf-upload-to-s3.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
extract-images-from-pdf-upload-to-s3.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and uploading the images to an Amazon S3 bucket via the AWS SDK.

extract-pdf-images-to-word.title: Extract PDF Images and Insert into Word Document
extract-pdf-images-to-word.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract images from a PDF and embed each image into a Word document using the Open XML SDK.

extract-pdf-text-with-progress.title: Extract PDF Text with Page‑by‑Page Progress Reporting
extract-pdf-text-with-progress.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor while reporting progress to the console.

extract-all-images-from-pdf.title: Extract All Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor
extract-all-images-from-pdf.description: Shows how to extract every image from a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor by setting StartPage to 1 and EndPage to 0 to process all pages.

extract-images-ocr-pdf.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR
extract-images-ocr-pdf.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then runs OCR on each image with Aspose.Pdf.AI to retrieve hidden text.

list-embedded-attachment-names.title: List Embedded Attachment Names from PDF
list-embedded-attachment-names.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to retrieve the names of all embedded attachments in a PDF without saving the files.

extract-pdf-attachments.title: Extract Attachments from PDF
extract-pdf-attachments.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to retrieve embedded file attachments from a PDF and write each one to a specified output folder.

extract-rename-pdf-attachments.title: Extract and Rename PDF Attachments with Timestamp
extract-rename-pdf-attachments.description: Shows how to extract embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save each file with a unique timestamp‑prefixed name.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: The example extracts all file attachments from a PDF, saves them to a folder, and calculates a SHA‑256 hash for each saved file to verify integrity.

extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by Extension
extract-pdf-attachments-by-extension.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull embedded attachments from a PDF and save them into subfolders based on each file's original extension.

verify-image-extraction-mode.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode with PdfExtractor
verify-image-extraction-mode.description: Demonstrates how the ExtractImageMode property of PdfExtractor influences the number of images extracted, distinguishing between resources defined in the PDF and images actually placed on pages.

extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
extract-images-from-pdf-with-guid-filena.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save each image with a unique GUID‑based filename to avoid naming collisions.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-zip.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to ZIP
extract-images-from-pdf-to-zip.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF document and package them into a ZIP archive.

create-contact-sheet-pdf.title: Create Contact Sheet PDF from Extracted Images
create-contact-sheet-pdf.description: Extracts all images from an input PDF and generates a new PDF that shows those images as thumbnails arranged in a grid layout.

extract-images-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create an Image Portfolio
extract-images-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and assemble them into a new PDF where each image occupies its own page.

extract-images-with-watermark.title: Extract Images from PDF with Watermark Overlay
extract-images-with-watermark.description: The example adds a PNG watermark to each page of a PDF, saves a temporary watermarked PDF, and then extracts all images from it as PNG files.

extract-images-pdf-to-base64-json.title: Extract Images from PDF to Base64 JSON
extract-images-pdf-to-base64-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, convert them to Base64 strings, and save the results as a JSON array.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-csv.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
extract-images-from-pdf-to-csv.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from each PDF page, save them as PNG files, and create a CSV file that records the image filename, page number, width, and height.

extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Sprite Sheet
extract-images-create-sprite-sheet.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and combining them into a single PNG sprite sheet.

extract-images-pdf-upload-s3.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to S3 with Server‑Side Encryption
extract-images-pdf-upload-s3.description: Demonstrates extracting each image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and uploading the images to an Amazon S3 bucket with AES‑256 server‑side encryption.

extract-images-to-unc-share__v2.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
extract-images-to-unc-share__v2.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them as PNG files to a network‑mapped UNC folder.

extract-images-pdf-html-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create HTML Gallery
extract-images-pdf-html-gallery.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, save them as PNG files, and generate a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images as a gallery.

extract-pdf-images-video-slideshow.title: Extract PDF Images and Build Video Slideshow
extract-pdf-images-video-slideshow.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then create a video slideshow from the extracted JPEG files with FFmpeg.

extract-images-pdf-gcs-upload.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
extract-images-pdf-gcs-upload.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF and then upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read permissions.

extract-images-by-keyword.title: Extract Images from Pages Containing a Keyword
extract-images-by-keyword.description: Demonstrates scanning each PDF page for a specific keyword and extracting only the images from pages where the keyword is found using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

extract-pdf-text-with-progress__v2.title: Extract PDF Text per Page with Progress Indicator
extract-pdf-text-with-progress__v2.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor while displaying a console progress bar.

extract-images-markdown-gallery.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Markdown Gallery
extract-images-markdown-gallery.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF, save them as files, and generate a markdown file with image links for documentation.

extract-text-and-images-from-pdf__v2.title: Extract Text and Images from PDFs using PdfExtractor
extract-text-and-images-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates a .NET console app that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text to .txt files and images to .png files from all PDFs in a mounted input directory.

extract-images-to-pdfa2b.title: Extract Images and Generate PDF/A‑2b Document
extract-images-to-pdfa2b.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, embed each image as an XObject on new pages, and convert the result to a PDF/A‑2b compliant document.
